canonical_name: Receptor for Advanced Glycation End Products
step_rationale: AGE–RAGE axis activates inflammatory pathways; links oxidized lipids to plaque inflammation.
mechanism: AGER (RAGE) mediates recognition of advanced glycation end products and oxidized lipids, amplifying plaque inflammation and endothelial dysfunction.

references.title: Proteomic insights into the associations between obesity, lifestyle factors, and coronary artery disease.
